label: Projector Power
info: Ported from Projector Power Control.txt (Q-SYS Lua). Individual power nodes: msg.payload = { projector: 'left' | 'right' | 'rear' }. powerAllOn / powerAllOff take no payload.

name: powerAllOn: 60s rear stagger is intentional — do not remove
info: Matches Timer.CallAfter(60, ...) in original Q-SYS Lua. Prevents simultaneous inrush current across all three lamp/laser units.

name: powerOnProjector
powerOffProjector
powerAllOn
powerAllOff
